subject: fix(engine): audit fixes — median bug, type safety, dead code cleanup
body:
- Fix detectPattern median: was using index into date-sorted array instead
  of proper sorted median. Now sorts amounts and uses median() from
  simple-statistics.
- Fix minimumBalanceDate type: was '' for empty input, now null (consistent
  with depletionDate: string | null).
- Add once-off/daily guards to detectAnchorDay and projectPattern switch
  so these frequency types are handled explicitly instead of falling through.
- Extract shared formatDate utility (dateUtils.ts) — was duplicated as
  formatDate in patterns.ts and fmtDate in forecast.ts.
- Add @deprecated JSDoc tags to legacy Expense, Actual, CategoryMapping,
  LineType types so IDEs surface deprecation warnings.
- Fix non-deterministic test: replaced Math.random() with deterministic
  variation in buildForecast prediction bands test.
- Add 3 tests for bootstrapPredictionBands (was exported but untested).

145 tests passing, zero type errors.

Tags: engine, patterns, forecast, runway, types, test, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
